title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Perospero, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sun Pirates as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MAMA is returning back to normal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen Mama with such a euphoric expression before... Perorin-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA!! You're the captain... so I guess I'll report the current situation to you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...first of all, Bage's crew should still be nearby.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's not the straw hats' ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates dis- appeared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carry them away as far as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the legendary ship that Fisher Tiger built himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot! Hot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're in the sea!! I was wonder- ing what I saw before, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was just that big monster's hand!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 30 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
